//deps: npm dep versions are the source of truth in ./package.json (read by BOTH runtimes). Deno consumes that node_modules via `nodeModulesDir: manual` — run `deno task bench:install` first. The bench/diagnostics import npm packages by bare specifier (resolved from package.json); there are no jsr or remote deps, so `lock: false` (no deno.lock — npm integrity is package-lock.json's job). Canonical-sync note lives in package.json.
